mapper.select: SELECT VOLUN_ACT_NO, VOLUN_ACT_TITLE, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN, VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END, CASE WHEN SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_BEGIN THEN '모집예정' WHEN SYSDATE < VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END + 1 THEN '모집중' ELSE '모집완료' END RECRU_STATUS FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY where volun_act_organ_no = #{volunActOrganNo} ORDER BY VOLUN_ACT_RECRU_END DESC
SELECT count(Volun_Act_No) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY WHERE volun_act_organ_no=#{volunActOrganNo}
SELECT user_no, user_nickname, user_type FROM tbl_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_pw = #{userPw} AND user_status = 1
